title: PwD - Product Reviews and Ratings - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-83: PwD - Product Reviews and Ratings. Validates average rating display, Reviews tab content (reviewer name, star rating, review text, date), reverse chronological order, no-reviews placeholder, review submission form with 700 char limit, and responsive behavior.

testCases.title: Average rating is visible near top of product page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Average rating value is visible near top.

testCases.title: Rating value is between 0 and 5
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Rating value parses to a number between 0 and 5.

testCases.title: Star icon is displayed next to rating
steps: Verify star SVG icon near rating.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Star SVG icon is displayed next to rating.

testCases.title: Review count is displayed near rating
steps: Verify review count text is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Review count text is visible near rating.

testCases.title: Review count shows number in parentheses
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Review count shows number in parentheses format.

testCases.title: Reviews tab is present in product tabs
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product details page.
expectedResults: Reviews tab exists in product tabs.

testCases.title: Clicking Reviews tab shows review content
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product details page.
expectedResults: Clicking Reviews tab shows review content panel.

testCases.title: Reviews tab panel is visible after click
expectedResults: Tab panel is visible.

testCases.title: Reviews tab content is non-empty
expectedResults: Content text length > 0.

testCases.title: Each review shows reviewer name or anonymous
steps: Verify each review has a name.
expectedResults: Each review shows a reviewer name or anonymous.

testCases.title: Each review shows star rating
steps: Verify each review has star rating.
expectedResults: Each review shows a star rating.

testCases.title: Each review shows review text
steps: Verify each review has text content.
expectedResults: Each review has text content.

testCases.title: Each review shows date posted
steps: Verify each review has a date.
expectedResults: Each review has a date.

testCases.title: Star ratings are between 1 and 5
steps: Parse star count from each review.
expectedResults: Star count is between 1 and 5.

testCases.title: Reviews are listed newest first
expectedResults: Reviews are listed in descending date order (newest first).

testCases.title: Product with no reviews shows placeholder text
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product with no reviews.
expectedResults: Placeholder text is visible.

testCases.title: Placeholder contains No reviews yet or similar
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product with no reviews.
expectedResults: Placeholder says 'No reviews yet' or similar.

testCases.title: Write a review button or form is visible
expectedResults: Write a review button or form is visible.

testCases.title: Review text box is present
steps: Verify textarea or text input for review.
expectedResults: Textarea or text input for review is present.

testCases.title: Text box accepts text input
expectedResults: Typed text appears in the text box.

testCases.title: Star rating selector is present in form
steps: Verify star rating input in review form.
expectedResults: Star rating input is present in the form.

testCases.title: Submit button is present
expectedResults: Submit button is visible.

testCases.title: Text box accepts up to 700 characters
expectedResults: Text box accepts up to 700 characters.

testCases.title: Submit with valid rating and text succeeds
testCases.preconditions: Review form is filled with valid data.
expectedResults: Submission succeeds.

testCases.title: Review count updates after submission
expectedResults: Review count increments after submission.

testCases.title: Submit without rating shows error or is prevented
testCases.preconditions: Review form has text but no rating.
expectedResults: Error shown or submission prevented.

testCases.title: Submit with empty text is handled
testCases.preconditions: Review form has rating but no text.
expectedResults: Behavior is handled gracefully.

testCases.title: Text box does not accept beyond character limit
expectedResults: Text beyond 700 chars is truncated or blocked.

testCases.title: Submit button is disabled or hidden when form is invalid
expectedResults: Submit button is disabled or hidden.

testCases.title: Reviews tab renders on mobile viewport
expectedResults: Reviews tab content is visible on mobile.

testCases.title: Reviews tab renders on tablet viewport
expectedResults: Reviews tab content is visible on tablet.

testCases.title: Review form is usable on mobile
steps: Verify text box and submit visible.
expectedResults: Review form text box and submit are visible.

testCases.title: No horizontal overflow on mobile
expectedResults: No horizontal overflow on mobile.
